title: MARK YOUR CALENDARS – Nov. 4th, 2016 – Southcentral Alaska Avalanche Workshop!!
summary: Mark your calendars for Friday November 4th, 2016! We know it's a few months away, but this will be the 4th annual SAAW (Southcentral Alaska Avalanche Workshop). The exciting thing for this year is our afternoon session, which will focus on topics relevant to not only avalanche professionals but rec...
